page_metadata.biotools__summary: Enzymatic link prediction (ELP) is a tool for predicting the likelihood of an enzymatic transformation between two molecules. ELP models enzymatic reactions cataloged in the KEGG database as a graph.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Enzymatic link prediction (ELP) is a tool for predicting the likelihood of an enzymatic transformation between two molecules. ELP models enzymatic reactions cataloged in the KEGG database as a graph.
